B7.snippet: exterior_algebra-p11.1 trace-diff attempt: c6 was bound to amdgpu with dynamic_debug enabled. Reset c6 triggered runtime state (MES RESET emitted, ih_process noise) but NOT a full driver re-probe with
gfx11 RELEASE_MEM PM4 packet requires 7 body dwords (8 total), not 6 (7 total). PACKET3(RELEASE_MEM, 6) header followed by event_cntl, data_cntl, addr_lo, addr_hi, value_lo, value_hi, AND trailing 0.
exterior_algebra-p11.1 RESOLUTION: trace-diff settles it — amdgpu's PSP path on cold gfx11 is MES-FIRST. PATH 1 (avoid MES) is INFEASIBLE on cold-vfio GPUs.

picks.why: NaN root cause analysis relevant to attention/conv stability.
picks.body_snippet:
SP matmul and SP flash attention NaN root cause and fix.

ROOT CAUSE (matmul): ggml_cuda_op_mul_mat reads buffer->context->device to determine tensor location. SP matmul created fake tensor descriptors (X_slice, W_local, dst_g) that inherited buffer from primary GPU. On secondary GPUs, src1_on_devic

picks.title: SP tensor descriptor review: Root cause confirmed. ggml_cuda_op_mul_mat (ggml-cuda.cu:1618) casts src1->buffer->context to get device ID. SP creates stack-local tensor copies with ->data pointing to s
picks.why: SP tensor descriptor issues relevant to graph construction.
picks.body_snippet: SP tensor descriptor review: Root cause confirmed. ggml_cuda_op_mul_mat (ggml-cuda.cu:1618) casts src1->buffer->context to get device ID. SP creates stack-local tensor copies with ->data pointing to secondary GPU memory but ->buffer still referencing primary GPU's buffer. This causes wrong-device me
